2026 Events

Demonstrations, workshops, outings, and our special Lace Day — there's something for everyone!

FEATURED EVENT 🎉

Our 1st Lace Day

Saturday 25th April 2026

Join us for our first-ever Lace Day! Suppliers will be in attendance, we'll have a guest speaker, and all proceeds support Hampshire & Isle of Wight Air Ambulance.

Buy Tickets — From £7.50 Learn More

🎭 Demonstrations

Tudor House Museum Demonstration

Saturday 17th May 2026

Confirmed

We'll be demonstrating our lace-making skills at Southampton's oldest museum.

Visit Tudor House & Garden

RVCP Demonstration

Saturday 12th September 2026

TBC

We hope to be demonstrating at Royal Victoria Country Park.

🧵 Workshops

2-Day Milanese Workshop

July 2026 (Dates TBC)

Fully Booked

Intensive two-day workshop focusing on Milanese lace techniques.

JUST LACE - 4 Day Workshop

2nd, 3rd, 4th & 5th October 2026

Spaces Available

Our annual 4-day workshop for class members only. A wonderful opportunity to immerse yourself in lacemaking.

Mounting Workshop

Sunday 1st November 2026 (Boorley Green)

Spaces Available

Learn how to properly mount and finish your lace pieces. Please sign up now if you wish to attend.

Milanese 2-Day Workshop

28th & 29th November 2026

Spaces Available

Another opportunity to learn Milanese techniques in this weekend workshop.

🚌 Outings

Christmas Fair Trip

5th December 2026

TBC

Possible trip by coach/minibus to a Christmas Fair. More details to follow.

Get in Touch

Hedge End Bobbin Lacemakers

Join our vibrant community and explore the beautiful art of bobbin lace-making. All skill levels welcome.
